This is a community maintained list of avatar bases that have been setup for use inside of Resonite, either by the community or by the avatar creator themselves.

Note that not every avatar you see someone use in-game is also pre-setup for everyone to use. If you're unsure try asking the person who is wearing the avatar.

There are several ways avatars can get distributed:

  • Official website, store, or other platform controlled by the avatar creator
  • Unofficially through members of the community that have gone through the avatar setup process already.
    • Public folders, direct messages, in-game etc.
    • Every maintainer has different preferences on how to prove ownership of paid avatars. They'll usually demand a receipt or proof of possession of source files (like .blend, .fbx, .glb, etc.).

Inhaltsverzeichnis

List of Avatars

Bearbeiten Quelltext bearbeiten

Tips

Bearbeiten Quelltext bearbeiten
  • Most columns are sortable by clicking on the column headline
  • The tables are also horizontally scrolling
    • Desktop: Use either the scrollbars or the scroll wheel while pressing shift to scroll sideways
    • Laptop trackpad: Swipe sideways using two fingers
    • Mobile: Just swipe sideways

Status Explanations

Bearbeiten Quelltext bearbeiten
Completion
WIP Avatar still needs significant work. Feel free to reach out to the maintainer, they might be able to accept your help on the setup process.
(Feature) Complete Avatar is fully usable in Resonite and has basic customizations setup. This can for example be a Respack or context menu options.

The avatar might be updated with extra features at a later point.

Finished Maintainer considers the avatar to be fully done and does not plan on adding to or changing the avatar in significant ways.
Abandoned Maintainer has stopped working on the avatar. Another user might be able to pick up from where they stopped.
Maintainer
Artist Maintained by the original artist and distributed through their official channels
Community Maintained by a member of the Resonite community that is not the original artist.
Endorsed Maintained by a member of the Resonite community that is not the original artist, but is the official way of getting the avatar in Resonite. Might also be distributed through the official channels of the artist but does not have to be.

Notes for Adding to the Lists

Bearbeiten Quelltext bearbeiten

Please fill all columns for a given avatars row. (Image and Notes may be left empty)

Please make sure you are allowed to upload the images here. Either take a photo in-game or ask the original creator for permission and note that on the files page.

Section for uploading avatar images. will remove later.

Bearbeiten Quelltext bearbeiten
